name: David Hilario Covarrubias Rosales
title: Director General — Centro de Investigación Científica y de Educación Superior de Ensenada
notes: CICESE history page lists Dr. David Hilario Covarrubias Rosales as current director general; SECIHTI launched a selection process for the next director general with applications closing 14 January 2026 (transition pending)

name: Gonzalo Eduardo Bacigalupo

name: Otto Cristian Wöhler

notes: Doctor en Ciencias Biológicas; functions assigned transitorily by Resolución 86/2024 effective 13 May 2024

name: Víctor Manuel Vidal Martínez
title: Director General — Instituto Mexicano de Investigación en Pesca y Acuacultura Sustentables (IMIPAS
orcid: Appointed October 2024 by President Claudia Sheinbaum; INAPESCA was renamed IMIPAS in 2023 (Aviso DOF 10-04-2024); previously Director CINVESTAV-Mérida (Oct 2022 – Oct 2024); SNI Nivel III; member Academia Mexicana de Ciencias

name: Píndaro Díaz Jaimes

notes: Designated by UNAM Junta de Gobierno for four-year period 2023-2027; biologist (UNAM 1985) PhD Biological Sciences UNAM 2000; SNI Nivel II; PRIDE D

name: Frank Raúl Gío Argáez
